task: #10 Benchmark P8.2 dense Q4_K WMMA prefill
summary: Raw dense Q4_K WMMA prefill is fast on Qwen3.5-0.8B-shaped tensors: actual GGUF layer-0 attn_gate 5.236 ms -> 0.378 ms (13.87x) and actual ffn_gate+ffn_up dual 15.604 ms -> 0.540 ms (28.88x). rocprof confirms gguf_q4_k_prefill_wmma_kernel and gguf_q4_k_prefill_dual_wmma_kernel replace the decode-shaped gguf_q4_k_prefill_out_kernel. However, the real Qwen3.5-0.8B-Q4_K_M resident model still materializes all 2D Q4_K tensors as q4_k_pack8, so the full-model 512/0 path does not exercise Q4_K WMMA yet; opt-in only affects Q8_0 raw projections. qwen35moe also does not exercise P8.2 dense Q4_K because its Q4_K tensors are rank-3 selected experts consumed by selected-MoE kernels (P8.4), not gguf_linear dense dispatch.

hardware.gpu: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (W7900 not rerun)

Target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

commands.actual_gguf_ffn_gate_up_baseline: PYTHONPATH=. HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=0 python3 /tmp/p8_q4_dense_gguf_tensor_bench.py --mode dual --slot-a ffn_gate --slot-b ffn_up --rows 512 --warmup-iters 2 --measured-iters 7 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --json /tmp/p8_q4_bench/gguf-ffn_gate_up-baseline.json
commands.actual_gguf_ffn_gate_up_wmma: PYTHONPATH=. HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 python3 /tmp/p8_q4_dense_gguf_tensor_bench.py --mode dual --wmma --slot-a ffn_gate --slot-b ffn_up --rows 512 --warmup-iters 2 --measured-iters 7 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --json /tmp/p8_q4_bench/gguf-ffn_gate_up-wmma.json

qwen35moe_diagnostic.reason: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B Q4_K tensors are raw rank-3 expert tensors (ffn_gate_exps/ffn_up_exps) consumed by selected-MoE kernels, not by dense gguf_linear/launch_gguf_linear_pair. P8.4 selected Q4_K MoE WMMA is required for qwen35moe Q4_K bucket movement.
qwen35moe_diagnostic.run_512_0: not run for P8.2 because dense Q4_K WMMA path is not exercised; P8.1 qwen35moe 512/0 artifact already covers Q8_0 opt-in behavior.

interpretation.next: Task #11/#12 selected Q4_K MoE WMMA for qwen35moe; future dense-materialization policy can choose raw Q4_K under opt-in if memory budget allows or replace pack8 with raw WMMA when beneficial.
